code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about an athlete (or related entities) into a single,
    fluent sentence. Each predicate is mapped to a short verb phrase; the resulting
    clauses are concatenated with commas and a final “and” for readability.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Simple mapping from predicate to a readable verb phrase.
    verb_map = {
        "league": "plays in",
        "manager": "is managed by",
        "position": "plays position",
        "ground": "has ground",
        "birthDate": "was born on",
        "birthPlace": "was born in",
        "birthYear": "was born in",
        "club": "plays for",
        "draftTeam": "was drafted by",
        "height": "is",
        "youthclub": "was in youth club",
        "currentclub": "currently plays for",
        "weight": "weighs",
        "deathPlace": "died in",
        "activeYearsStartYear": "started active years in",
        "currentteam": "currently in team",
        "debutTeam": "debuted with",
        "draftPick": "was draft pick",
        "draftRound": "was drafted in round",
        "formerTeam": "formerly played for",
        "playerNumber": "wears number",
        "college": "attended",
        "draftYear": "was drafted in",
        "coach": "coached by",
        "owner": "owned by",
        "city": "based in",
        "leader": "led by",
        "anthem": "has anthem",
        "ethnicGroup": "has ethnic group",
        "language": "speaks",
        "generalManager": "has general manager",
        "chairman": "has chairman",
        "season": "season",
        "currency": "uses currency",
        "demonym": "people are called",
        "officialLanguage": "official language is",
        "stadium": "home stadium is",
        "universityTeam": "university team",
        "mostChampions": "most champions are",
        "leaderTitle": "leader title",
        "isPartOf": "is part of",
        "country": "country is",
        "utcOffset": "UTC offset is",
        "timeZone": "time zone is",
        "areaTotal": "total area is",
        "foundingDate": "founded on",
    }

    clauses = []
    for triple in triples:
        verb = verb_map.get(triple.predicate, triple.predicate)
        # Ensure proper spacing and punctuation
        clause = f"{triple.subject} {verb} {triple.object}"
        clauses.append(clause)

    if len(clauses) == 1:
        sentence = clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1] + "."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
